grounding.shadow: faint contact ellipse beneath each active actor
grounding.stationaryRule: never play walk animation from an action label alone

poolActivity.entry: actor walks along explicit perimeter waypoints to the current shot or waiting station
poolActivity.loop: 8 FPS directional walk only while coordinates change
poolActivity.alignment: shooter stops at a frozen stance and faces the cue ball before the shot
poolActivity.exit: turn advances only after shot launch, then the next actor receives a new station route
poolActivity.fallback: none, running in place is rejected

knownLimitations: These first directional sheets still require browser visual approval at mobile game scale.
Unique activity sheets beyond pool stance remain a separate required animation expansion.
The migration branch is not approved for main promotion until direct browser testing passes.
